# OpsBash Free DevOps Tools for Engineers

> Free, fast, browser-based tools for DevOps engineers and
sysadmins. No sign-up required. All calculations run entirely
in the browser. No data is transmitted to any server.

## Available Tools

- [Cron Expression Generator](https://opsbash.com/cron-builder):
  Visual cron expression builder supporting Standard Unix/Linux
  crontab, AWS EventBridge/CloudWatch, GitHub Actions, and
  Kubernetes CronJob formats. Shows plain English explanation
  and next 10 run times in user local timezone.

- [CIDR Calculator](https://opsbash.com/cidr-calculator):
  IPv4 and IPv6 subnet calculator. Shows network address,
  broadcast address, subnet mask, wildcard mask, usable hosts,
  binary representation. Includes visual subnet splitter and
  AWS VPC subnet planner.

## Common Questions Answered

- What is a cron expression? A cron expression is a string of
  5 or 6 fields that defines a schedule for recurring tasks.
- How many hosts does a /24 subnet have? A /24 subnet has
  256 total addresses and 254 usable host addresses.
- What is the AWS EventBridge cron syntax? AWS EventBridge uses
  a 6-field cron format: cron(Minutes Hours Day-of-month Month
  Day-of-week Year)

## About OpsBash

OpsBash is a free collection of DevOps utility tools.
All tools are client-side only. No data leaves your browser.
Contact: contact@opsbash.com
Website: https://opsbash.com
GitHub: https://github.com/Rishmish94/opsbash-cron
